description: Perform a surveillance compliance check using Epi Info 7 to identify which US jurisdictions failed to submit their weekly report. Using the master list Jurisdictions.csv and the transaction file Receipts_Week40.csv (located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Data), determine which jurisdictions from the master list are missing from the receipts for Week 40. Create an Epi Info project named NNDSS_Tracking in C:\Users\Docker\Documents with tables named Jurisdictions and Receipts. Compare the datasets using StateCode to find jurisdictions with no matching submission. Save the list of missing StateName values, one per line, to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\missing_states.txt.
